DBG="/tmp/libmonosgen-2.0.so.dbg"
aarch64-linux-gnu-objdump -t "$DBG" 2>/dev/null | awk '/F .text/ { split($1, a, ""); addr=$1; size=$(NF-1); name=$NF; printf "%s %s %s\n", addr, size, name }' | sort | awk '
{
  start = strtonum("0x" $1)
  size = strtonum("0x" $2)
  end = start + size
  target1 = 0x2f4b20
  target2 = 0x2f4c84
  if (start <= target1 && end > target1) print "0x2f4b20 in: " $3 " (start=0x" $1 " size=0x" $2 ")"
  if (start <= target2 && end > target2) print "0x2f4c84 in: " $3 " (start=0x" $1 " size=0x" $2 ")"
}' | head -5
